# The Poppa Wahoo Collective

> Family-run, veteran-owned sportfishing charter fleet in Islamorada, Florida Keys. Founded 2025 by David and Brian Epstein in tribute to their father Bob Epstein, the Miami Herald fishing editor.

## Business facts
- Dock: Three Waters Resort and Marina, 84001 Overseas Hwy, Islamorada, FL 33036
- Nearshore departures: Square Grouper, 80461 Overseas Hwy, Islamorada
- Phone (call or text): (305) 394-5350
- Email: info@poppawahoo.com
- Hours: daily, 5 am to 9 pm
- Veteran owned, family run
- Rating: 5.0 across 7 published charter reviews

## Fleet
- Poppa Wahoo: 55' Hatteras sportfisher, twin 1250 HP diesels, 40 knot cruise, up to 6 guests, A/C salon, Starlink
- Poppa Wahoo Too: 53' Hatteras sportfisher, up to 6 guests
- Poppa Bay: 25' 2022 Sea Hunt BXSF bay boat, up to 4 anglers
- Poppa Toon: 23' Barletta tritoon for cruises

## Trips and rates
- Deep sea half day (4 hr): $1,475
- Deep sea three-quarter day (6 hr): $1,975
- Deep sea full day (8 hr): $2,475
- Evening shark trip (3 hr, 5 pm): $1,000
- Overnight swordfish (about 30 miles out): $2,700
- Nearshore on Poppa Bay (3/5/8 hr): from $1,050
- Sunset cruise (2 hr): $575
- Sandbar cruise: $800
- All fishing trips include boat, fuel, captain and mate, gear, tackle, live bait, licenses, water, snacks, and catch cleaning

## Captains
- Capt. Brian Epstein, co-owner, USCG 100 Ton Master, 40+ years in the Keys
- Capt. David Epstein, co-owner, overnight swordfish program
- Capt. Skip Bradeen, voted Best Charter Boat Captain in the Upper Keys 14 straight years, Top 50 Captains in the World (Salt Water Fisherman)
- Capt. George Clark Jr., 30+ years, Discovery Channel's "The Fish Guyz"

## Site
- https://crossfiber.github.io/poppa-wahoo/
